headline: Trump says U.S. will build first refinery in 50 years with investment from India's Reliance Industries
summary: U.S. President said India's largest private energy company Reliance Industries is investing in a $300-billion refinery project in Texas.

headline: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday lower following a bout of volatile trading as investors sought to keep up with the latest developments in the Iran war.

headline: Oil Plunges 30% From Peak, Yet Prices At The Pump Keep Rising: Who Is Profiting Here?
summary: WTI crude collapsed nearly 30% since its Sunday night's peak, yet U.S. gasoline and diesel prices keep rising. Refiners and fuel distributors may be the biggest beneficiaries of the widening crack spread.

headline: Gas prices pass $3.50 per gallon to highest level since 2024 amid U.S.-Iran war
summary: Prices are up 21% from a month ago with the oil market roiled by the U.S.-Iran war.

headline: Phillips 66 Board Refresh May Shift Capital Returns And Oversight Priorities
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) appointed Howard Ungerleider and Kevin Meyers to its Board following engagement with Elliott Investment Management. The company also announced planned retirements for certain long-serving Board members and outlined a refreshed director slate targeting 2026. These moves indicate a significant refresh of Board oversight, informed by shareholder input on governance and long term priorities. For investors considering Phillips 66, these Board changes sit alongside a share...

headline: 10-year Treasury yield is little changed as oil tumbles after Trump warns Iran over Hormuz flows
summary: The 10-year Treasury yield was flat as oil prices tumbled after Trump warned that Iran would be hit harder if it tried to halt Strait of Hormuz shipments.
